Home › Osceola County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Osceola County

The following 10 restaurants in Osceola County received a health grade of D or F at their most recent inspection, according to Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) public inspection records. Each listing shows its grade, score, and violation counts, ordered from the lowest score.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • L F 32
    LA FUENTE RESTAURANT, BAKERY & CAFE

    American 3.8★ (2415)

    Kissimmee · Orange County

    VegDFKeto +2

    Violations: 5 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 19 basic

  • E F 37
    EL REY DE LOS POLLOS

    American 4.1★ (1659)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    DFHealthy

    Violations: 3 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 20 basic

  • G F 52
    GRILLERS PUERTO RICO

    Other 4.4★ (5289)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    Healthy

    Violations: 4 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 13 basic

  • F F 54
    FRIENDLY'S BROOKLYN STYLE PIZZA

    Pizza 4.5★ (1681)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    Halal

    Violations: 2 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 15 basic

  • S F 56
    STONE & CURRENT

    Other 4.3★ (14559)

    Kissimmee · Orange County

    Violations: 4 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 6 basic

  • P F 59
    PEI WEI FRESH KITCHEN #0202

    Chinese 4.4★ (1581)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    VeganVegDF +1

    Violations: 4 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 6 basic

  • T D 61
    THAI THANI RESTAURANT

    Thai 4.2★ (1364)

    Celebration · Osceola County

    VeganVegGF +5

    Violations: 3 high-priority, 1 intermediate, 12 basic

  • W D 63
    WAFFLE HOUSE #435

    American 4.2★ (2453)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    Violations: 4 high-priority, 5 basic

  • H D 65
    HOKKAIDO CHINESE & JAPANESE

    Chinese 3.8★ (6278)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    VeganVegDF +2

    Violations: 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 10 basic

  • T D 67
    TWISTEE TREAT

    Other 4.5★ (1998)

    Kissimmee · Osceola County

    Violations: 3 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 3 basic
